text:
- Tested build in amd64 and all is ok.
- Changed "@dirrm %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Math" to "@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/Math", because www/MT port install files in this directory.
